query: Show me sales by state in descending order.
articleText:
AGENT RESPONSE

02:00 PM

high confidence

Utah leads all states with $92.6M in sales, followed by Connecticut at $89.2M and Oklahoma at $85.8M. California ranks last among the 30 states with $49.6M in sales.

WHY IT MATTERS

The 87% sales gap between the top-performing state (Utah) and the bottom-performing state (California) suggests significant geographic variation in market penetration or customer concentration.

Priority Insights

high importance

Top 5 States Represent 44% of Total Sales

The top 5 states (Utah, Connecticut, Oklahoma, Alabama, Oregon) account for $435.2M of the $2.10B total, indicating moderate geographic concentration.

high importance

Wide Performance Range Across States

Sales range from $49.6M (California) to $92.6M (Utah), an 87% spread, suggesting uneven market development or customer base distribution.

medium importance

Bottom Three States Cluster Closely

Florida ($54.6M), Texas ($52.1M), and California ($49.6M) are within 10% of each other, forming a distinct low-performance tier.

ASSUMPTIONS

Interpretation constraints used for this answer.

1
Rankings reflect total sales volume; ranking by transaction count or average transaction value would produce different orderings.
2
Sales figures span the full 2024–2025 period and are not adjusted for state population or market size.
3
All 30 states shown have complete data coverage for the period; no states are excluded due to insufficient data.
